scripts.start:user: cd services/user-service && set USER_SERVICE_PORT=3001 && node server.js
scripts.start:restaurant: cd services/restaurant-service && set RESTAURANT_SERVICE_PORT=3002 && node server.js
scripts.start:order: cd services/order-service && set ORDER_SERVICE_PORT=3003 && node server.js
scripts.start:delivery: cd services/delivery-service && set DELIVERY_SERVICE_PORT=3004 && node server.js
scripts.start:payment: cd services/payment-service && set PAYMENT_SERVICE_PORT=3005 && node server.js
scripts.install:all: cd services/user-service && npm install && cd ../restaurant-service && npm install && cd ../order-service && npm install && cd ../delivery-service && npm install && cd ../payment-service && npm install
